name: epic-breakdown
content:
// PATTERN BANK: Epic Breakdown
// Strip everything, just pads and diva, slow build
setcps(138/60/4)
let breakFilter = slider(600, 200, 6000, 10, "BREAK Filter Open")
let divaBreak = slider(0.4, 0, 0.7, 0.01, "DIVA Swell")
let tension = slider(0, 0, 1, 0.01, "TENSION Build")

let diva = note("<[a3,e4] [f3,c4] [d3,a3] [e3,b3]>".slow(4))
  .s("gm_voice_oohs")
  .gain(divaBreak)
  .room(0.95)
  .size(0.95)
  .cutoff(breakFilter)
  .vowel("<a e i o>".slow(8))

let sweep = note("<a2 f2 d2 e2>".slow(4))
  .s("gm_pad_sweep")
  .gain(0.35)
  .cutoff(perlin.range(300, breakFilter).slow(16))
  .room(1)
  .size(1)

let crystal = note("a5 ~ ~ ~ e5 ~ ~ ~".slow(2))
  .s("gm_fx_crystal")
  .gain(0.12)
  .delay(0.7)
  .delaytime(0.5)
  .delayfeedback(0.6)
  .room(1)

let snareRoll = s("sd").bank("RolandTR909")
  .gain(tension.mul(0.5))
  .struct("x x x x x x x x")
  .room(0.5)

stack(diva, sweep, crystal, snareRoll)
